title: Activities
description: From anime themed Jeopardy and movie screenings to creating your own anime dubs, the Terrapin Anime Society offers a wide range of fun activities for people with all kinds of interests. All activities are announced in advance on our Discord!

cards.name: Movie Bingo
cards.description: Create your own bingo cards filled with anime tropes, clichés, and common story beats. As we watch a movie together, players mark off predictions as they happen.

cards.name: Anime Jeopardy
cards.description: A fast paced trivia game featuring anime themed questions across different categories and difficulty levels. Compete in teams to test your knowledge of series, characters, studios, openings, and more.

cards.name: Charades & Picture Guessing
cards.description: Guess anime characters, scenes, or events through charades, drawings, or images. This game focuses on teamwork, quick thinking, and recognizing iconic moments from across anime history.

cards.name: 20 Questions
cards.description: Players try to guess the mystery anime, character, or concept by asking yes or no questions. A simple but competitive game that rewards clever questions and deep fandom knowledge.

cards.name: Hot Takes Night
cards.description: Members share their most controversial anime opinions, from overrated series to unpopular character rankings. After each take, the group votes and discusses, keeping the debate fun and engaging.

cards.name: Magic Boy Screening
cards.description: A special screening of Magic Boy, often considered one of the first anime films shown in the United States. Includes historical context led by Professor Stevens.

cards.name: Chainsaw Man Event
cards.description: A large scale themed event held in partnership with Sony to promote the Chainsaw Man: Reze movie. Featuring exclusive posters, merchandise giveaways, and themed games.

cards.name: Anime Scavenger Hunt
cards.description: Anime themed questions and clues are scattered across multiple subjects. Teams work together to solve prompts and track down answers, blending anime knowledge with creative problem solving.

cards.name: Live Fandubs
cards.description: Members dub over anime scenes in real time while the group watches. A lighthearted event that encourages creativity, voice acting, and humor.

cards.name: Make Your Own Presentation
cards.description: Create and present a short presentation on any anime related topic of your choice. Topics range from favorite series and characters to themes, studios, history, or personal interpretations.
